headline: JD Vance 🍆🇺🇸 IRAN NUKES 🧪👀 GET IAEA BACK IN THE GAME 🎮💥
text: JD Vance 🍆👔 just dropped the BOMBSHELL 💣 that IRAN 🇮🇷 is OPENING the DOORS 🚪🔓 for NUCLEAR INSPECTORS 🧪👀 to SWOOP BACK IN like a BOUNCER at the CLUB 🍆💦 after the first ROUND 🥊 of US-IRAN TALKS 🤝 in SWITZERLAND 🏔️🧀! The VP said MAJOR PROGRESS 🏆📈 was made on a ROADMAP 🗺️🍆 to a FINAL DEAL within 60 DAYS 🗓️😩 – and that includes letting IAEA 🕵️‍♂️🔬 peek at all those ENRICHED URANIUM STOCKPILES 🧪💰 like they're checking for CONTRABAND 🍆🍌! Strait of HORMUZ 🚢🌊 is getting REOPENED for COMMERCIAL VESSELS 🛳️💨 so the OIL 🛢️💦 can FLOW again without any FUNKY MISCOMMUNICATION 📱😵 – a whole DE-CONFLICTION CELL 📞🧬 was set up between US, IRAN and LEBANON 🇱🇧 to STOP the FIGHTING 🥊💥 on ALL FRONTS including HEZBOLLAH HITS 💥🕋 that already killed 67 in LEBANON and 5 ISRAELI SOLDIERS 🪖😢! The 14-POINT MOU 📜✍️ signed by TRUMP 🍊👑 and PEZESHKIAN 🤝 includes IAEA ACCESS to BOMBED SITES 🏚️💣 that got SUSPENDED after the 12-DAY WAR 🔥⏰ and now they're EXPECTED BACK this WEEK 🗓️ at the LATEST or EVEN TODAY 🌞😱! Vance called the NUCLEAR ISSUE the ONE that has AMERICANS MOST EXCITED 🥳🇺🇸 like it's the ULTIMATE PLOT TWIST 📖🍆 in a JCPOA REBOOT 🎮🔄 – Iran keeps swearing it's all CIVILIAN POWER ⚡🏭 but the WORLD 🌍🤨 and IAEA aren't buying the EXCUSE 🧢💸! With QATAR 🇶🇦 and PAKISTAN 🇵🇰 mediating the talks like they're the ULTIMATE WINGMEN 🕊️🍆, the COMMUNICATION LINE 📞🔗 is now OPEN to AVOID INCIDENTS and keep SHIPS SAILING 🛳️💨 safe through the STRAIT – this is the FIRST REAL TEST 🧪🔥 for the LEBANON DE-CONFLICTION CREW and if they PASS, it's PERMANENT PEACE 🕊️🍆 for the REGION! Iranian negotiators dipped from BÜRGENSTOCK 🏔️ but TECHNICAL TALKS keep SLAYING 🔪📊 so the NUCLEAR WEAPONS PROGRAM NIGHTMARE 💀☢️ gets BURIED for GOOD!
